MS.S: PowerShell interface for Microsoft PowerApps and Flow Administrative features

Current Release:_x000D__x000A_2.0.217_x000D__x000A_ Update example for the Cancel-EUDBMigration cmdlet_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for support getting flows with trigger urls that require migration._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowWithMigratingTriggerUrl_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.209_x000D__x000A_ Adding function to upload user mapping file in single command._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-UploadUserMappingFile_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.208_x000D__x000A_ Update examples for the Power Automate EUDB migration_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.206_x000D__x000A_ Add support for the EUDB cancel experience._x000D__x000A_ Cancel-EUDBMigration_x000D__x000A__x0009_Added new apis for support getting flows with http action in an environment._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowWithHttpAction_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.205_x000D__x000A_ Add support for migrating flows into EUDB compliant resource groups_x000D__x000A__x0009_Start-EUDBMigration_x000D__x000A__x0009_Get-EUDBMigrationStatus_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.203_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for support getting flows that remain encrypted by Microsoft Managed Key in an environment._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowEncryptedByMicrosoftKey_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.198_x000D__x000A_ Update required params in TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration and TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment. We need MigrationID to initiate a Tenant To Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ Added new APIs to support the submission and approval process for Tenant to Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ Removed TenantToTenant-GetStatus Command which is not supported anymore._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewApprovalRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetMigrationStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-DeleteMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.197_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for Submitting and Approving Tenant To Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-SubmitMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ManageMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.170_x000D__x000A_ Add Support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-SubmitMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ManageMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.169_x000D__x000A_ Add Support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration_x000D__x000A_ GenerateResourceStorage-PowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.168_x000D__x000A__x0009_Add support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration_x000D__x000A_ GenerateResourceStorage-PowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.167_x000D__x000A_ Add support for migrating non-solution flows to solution as admin._x000D__x000A_ Add-AdminFlowsToSolution_x000D__x000A_ Support 'CreatedBy' filter which was removed in 2.0.166. We can support this filter now as backend API has been fixed to return the CreatedBy metadata._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.166_x000D__x000A_ Update Get-AdminFlow to use v2 route for fetching flows. This v2 route returns less information about flows._x000D__x000A_ Response will contain the following flow properties: Id, display name, created time, last modified time, state and workflow entity Id._x000D__x000A_ BREAKING CHANGE: Removed support for 'CreatedBy' filter as v2 route does not return the creator of the flow._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.165_x000D__x000A_ Add support for setting the background operations state on an environment._x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.163_x000D__x000A_ Fix polling support in Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState_x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState _x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.157_x000D__x000A_ Added new Apis to get environment cmk status in PowerAutomate. _x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowEnvironmentCmkStatus_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.156_x000D__x000A_ Add support for setting backup retention period on an environment._x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentBackupRetentionPeriod_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.155_x000D__x000A_ Add flow at risk of suspension function._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowAtRiskOfSuspension_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.155_x000D__x000A_ Add support for Developer environment provisioning and TemplateMetadata parameter for Dataverse provisioning._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.154_x000D__x000A_ Update license uri link_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.153_x000D__x000A__x0009_Add new governance error settings functions_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Get-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_New-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Set-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Remove-GovernanceErrorSettingss_x000D__x000A__x0009_PowerAppDlpErrorSettings will be deprecated in a future version._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.150_x000D__x000A_ Remove warning from Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentGovernanceConfiguration
PowerShell interface for Microsoft PowerApps and Flow Administrative features

Current Release:_x000D__x000A_2.0.217_x000D__x000A_ Update example for the Cancel-EUDBMigration cmdlet_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for support getting flows with trigger urls that require migration._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowWithMigratingTriggerUrl_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.209_x000D__x000A_ Adding function to upload user mapping file in single command._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-UploadUserMappingFile_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.208_x000D__x000A_ Update examples for the Power Automate EUDB migration_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.206_x000D__x000A_ Add support for the EUDB cancel experience._x000D__x000A_ Cancel-EUDBMigration_x000D__x000A__x0009_Added new apis for support getting flows with http action in an environment._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowWithHttpAction_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.205_x000D__x000A_ Add support for migrating flows into EUDB compliant resource groups_x000D__x000A__x0009_Start-EUDBMigration_x000D__x000A__x0009_Get-EUDBMigrationStatus_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.203_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for support getting flows that remain encrypted by Microsoft Managed Key in an environment._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowEncryptedByMicrosoftKey_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.198_x000D__x000A_ Update required params in TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration and TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment. We need MigrationID to initiate a Tenant To Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ Added new APIs to support the submission and approval process for Tenant to Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ Removed TenantToTenant-GetStatus Command which is not supported anymore._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewApprovalRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetMigrationStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-DeleteMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.197_x000D__x000A_ Added new apis for Submitting and Approving Tenant To Tenant Migrations._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-SubmitMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ManageMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.170_x000D__x000A_ Add Support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-SubmitMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ManageMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-ViewMigrationRequest_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.169_x000D__x000A_ Add Support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration_x000D__x000A_ GenerateResourceStorage-PowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.168_x000D__x000A__x0009_Add support for Tenant To Tenant Migration and for generating resource storage._x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-GetStatus_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-MigratePowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A_ TenantToTenant-PrepareMigration_x000D__x000A_ GenerateResourceStorage-PowerAppEnvironment_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.167_x000D__x000A_ Add support for migrating non-solution flows to solution as admin._x000D__x000A_ Add-AdminFlowsToSolution_x000D__x000A_ Support 'CreatedBy' filter which was removed in 2.0.166. We can support this filter now as backend API has been fixed to return the CreatedBy metadata._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.166_x000D__x000A_ Update Get-AdminFlow to use v2 route for fetching flows. This v2 route returns less information about flows._x000D__x000A_ Response will contain the following flow properties: Id, display name, created time, last modified time, state and workflow entity Id._x000D__x000A_ BREAKING CHANGE: Removed support for 'CreatedBy' filter as v2 route does not return the creator of the flow._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.165_x000D__x000A_ Add support for setting the background operations state on an environment._x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.163_x000D__x000A_ Fix polling support in Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState_x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentRuntimeState _x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.157_x000D__x000A_ Added new Apis to get environment cmk status in PowerAutomate. _x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowEnvironmentCmkStatus_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.156_x000D__x000A_ Add support for setting backup retention period on an environment._x000D__x000A_ Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentBackupRetentionPeriod_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.155_x000D__x000A_ Add flow at risk of suspension function._x000D__x000A_ Get-AdminFlowAtRiskOfSuspension_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.155_x000D__x000A_ Add support for Developer environment provisioning and TemplateMetadata parameter for Dataverse provisioning._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.154_x000D__x000A_ Update license uri link_x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.153_x000D__x000A__x0009_Add new governance error settings functions_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Get-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_New-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Set-GovernanceErrorSettings_x000D__x000A__x0009__x0009_Remove-GovernanceErrorSettingss_x000D__x000A__x0009_PowerAppDlpErrorSettings will be deprecated in a future version._x000D__x000A__x000D__x000A_2.0.150_x000D__x000A_ Remove warning from Set-AdminPowerAppEnvironmentGovernanceConfiguration
